gcp.binaryauthorization.projects.updateP.description: Creates or updates a project's policy, and returns a copy of the new policy. A policy is always updated as a whole, to avoid race conditions with concurrent policy enforcement (or management!) request

required.description: Output only. The resource name, in the format `projects/*/policy`. There is at most one policy per project.
